form.formComment: Resumes after a break of a year and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at Taruma March 30 2025 over 2000m, 12 len behind Obataye with 52kg at $10.80. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at Taruma January 19 2025 over 1900m, 25 len behind Shallow Now with 55kg at $8.80. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 43-day let-up. Last start won by 1.0 len at this track February 22 over 1500m in the wet defeating Happy Caramba with 56kg at $68.50. Before that 7th of 11 at this track on January 26 over 1300m, in the wet; 14 len behind Salto Da Gloria with 56kg at $12.80. Nice alley and worth including.

form.formComment: Most recently favourite; scored a big 3.5 len win at this track March 16 over 1500m defeating Pentagono carrying 58kg at $2.30. Before that 3rd in a small field at this track on February 2 over 1400m, in the wet; 7 len behind One Star with 58kg at $2.70. Might just find this lot a bit smart.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Freshened for 43 days. First-up 3rd of 8 at this track on January 25 over 1400m, 7 len behind Libertad Nuestra carrying 53kg at $2.70. Second run from a spell 4th of 8 at this track on February 22 over 1500m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Gate Three with 56kg at $1.90. Racing well. Has strong claims.

form.formComment: Returns from a 41-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 9 at this track on February 24 over 1500m, on a wet track; 0.8 len behind Molecagem carrying 56kg at $5.70. Before that second last in a small field at this track on February 2 over 1400m, on heavy track; 14 len behind Glory Dany carrying 56kg at $17.10. One of the prime contenders in a most suitable contest.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at this track January 13 over 1500m, 4 len behind Rafa Do Iguassu carrying 54kg at $8.30.
